description: Reports (reports/**) that are not referenced by dashboard, governance, effectiveness, or scripts. Stale = not in CANONICAL_PATHS or dashboard endpoint map.
stale_report_dirs: reports/audit (weekly audit — check if any script reads)
reports/phase9_data_integrity (proof artifacts — keep for audit trail?)
stale_single_files: Many reports/*.md at root (one-off summaries: STRATEGIC_RESET_*.md, BACKTEST_*.md, etc.) — keep for history or archive.
recommendation: Archive (move to reports/archive/YYYY-MM/) rather than delete. Update dashboard and scripts to never point to archived paths. Adversarial review before deletion.
